content: Phase 1: Create deliverables + static validation (42/42, compose config, init.sh e2e, fail-fast)
Phase 2: Backend (FastAPI) - serve files, downloads, zip, live validation endpoint
Phase 2: Frontend (React) dashboard - hero, architecture, ports, fixes, file viewer, validation, quickstart
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent (backend + frontend)
Phase 2: Fix any issues found by testing agent
